top_signals.title: Trump extols America and rails at communism in U.S. 250th celebration
top_signals.summary: He urged Americans to protect the freedoms envisioned by the nation's founders against what he called the "communist" threat posed by progressive Democrats.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
top_signals.summary: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
